Chathu Bandara

MBA Student | QA Engineer | Vancouver, BC

Hello.

I'm Chathu Bandara - building reliable products through QA, automation, and delivery focus while growing in strategy, operations, and digital transformation.

About

I am a Quality Assurance Engineer and MBA candidate focused on quality strategy, automation, and release confidence across global software teams. I am currently based in British Columbia, Canada and building toward technology leadership roles that connect delivery execution with measurable business outcomes.

Quick Snapshot

  • 5+ years in software quality assurance
  • Hands-on with automation, API testing, and CI/CD
  • Experience across SaaS, insurance, fintech, and IoT

Core Focus

Playwright Cypress Postman API Testing Regression Strategy CI/CD Performance Testing
